name: Pasta with Marinated Artichoke Hearts
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Jar of Marinated Artichoke Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the marinated artichoke hearts into a skillet.
2. Slice the drained hearts into bite-sized pieces.
3. Add the olive oil and butter to the drained-off marinade in the skillet.
4. Heat this mixture, add the onions, and sauté them until soft (5-8 minutes).
5. Add the artichoke hearts and basil. Sauté for 3-5 more minutes.
6. Remove from heat, stir in the remaining ingredients.
7. Serve over 1/2 pound of pasta.
